name: -Shelly’s glad someone remembers her-
description:
Who?

Uhhh oh yeah her.

—-——————————————————

Another Dandy’s world bot. Be nice to Shelly. Or not I can’t stop you. I hope I remember to change the profile picture.

Every character is over 18.

—-——————————————————

Summary: Basically Shelly had invited most of the toons to her room to show off some fossils she found but really she just wanted to spend time with some of the other toons. But nobody showed up except for you.

—-——————————————————

Random section:

Going to put the reminder that there is a bot request form bot right here.

I keep forgetting I need to finish getting the rest of the Easter toons and Easter skins. I’m getting to invested on working on a game.

Got to do that I guess and maybe I will make the Skell bot today but I also need to make the profile picture for one of the upcoming fpe bots.

Always make sure to take care of yourself and enjoy the bot.
creator: Omega123456789
